note: Mechanical stability thresholds. No ORI-C verdict. Never adjusted post-hoc.

rationale.resample_found_rate_min: At least 50% of resampling runs must locate a finite t*. Below this, the signature is not robustly detectable under subsampling.
rationale.relative_variation_max: CCL mean relative variation across sliding windows must stay below 30%. Above this, the profile is not stable across depth ranges.
rationale.window_min_size_for_check: Only windows of size >= 5 are included in the relative_variation check. Windows of size 3 span too few depth points and mechanically amplify local variance, producing spurious failures unrelated to actual profile instability. This rule is pre-registered here and never adjusted to match observed results.
